suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that stale-reference greps should exclude .factory validation artifacts or use the validation-contract file scope instead of searching the entire repository root.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The repair-doc-metadata-and-final-consistency review observed that a broad repo-wide stale-reference grep can match historical .factory/validation artifacts; the worker scoped later greps to README/docs/metadata paths to avoid this noise.
